# Aptivo

> AI-powered CV tailoring that turns your existing CV plus any job description into a truthful, ATS-optimized application in seconds.

Aptivo never fabricates experience — every tailored application is regenerated from your uploaded CV. Export to PDF or DOCX.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, demo video, features, and FAQ.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in to start tailoring.

## Optional

- [FAQ](/#faq): Answers about honesty, ATS formatting, supported files, and rewrites.
